allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-ChildItem -Path . -Recurse -File | ForEach-Object { $content = Get-Content $_.FullName -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($content\) { $updated = $content -replace '\\''__APP_NAME__'\\'', '\\''todo-app'\\'' -replace '\\''__APP_TITLE__'\\'', '\\''TodoApp'\\''; if \($updated -ne $content\) { Set-Content $_.FullName $updated -NoNewline; Write-Host "Updated: $\($_.FullName\)" } } }')
